query: SELECT p.id, p.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complement_groups cg WHERE cg.product_id = p.id) as groups_count FROM products p WHERE p.name LIKE '%Cervejas%' ORDER BY groups_count DESC LIMIT 5;
